description:
Advances: mutagen.mutation_pipeline

Deliverable: migrate .spec/specs/mutation_pipeline.spec.md to the SpecLedEx schema:
- spec-scenarios block: reshape each scenario to given:/when:/then: arrays (bespoke shape fails parse with 'expected array').
- spec-verification block: replace execute:/source_file: stubs with command: and target: entries; every requirement gets a verification entry.
- spec-meta: flip status: draft -> active once the file validates.
- keep prose, intent, id, surface, and decisions links intact.

Verification:
- mix spec.validate emits ZERO errors for mutagen.mutation_pipeline (baseline: 10 errors on this file).
- subject status is active in .spec/state.json.

Out of Scope (files): every .spec.md EXCEPT mutation_pipeline.spec.md; lib/**; test/**.
Allowed touches: .spec/specs/mutation_pipeline.spec.md only.
Out of Scope (intent): no realized_by bindings (phase2); no code/test edits; do not alter requirement ids or delete requirements.
Merge gate: mix spec.validate (0 errors for mutagen.mutation_pipeline) && mix compile --warnings-as-errors && mix test

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED

Migrated .spec/specs/mutation_pipeline.spec.md to the SpecLedEx schema.

Changes:
- spec-scenarios (s1-s17): reshaped each scenario to given:/when:/then: arrays (was bespoke scalar given/when/then -> 'expected array' parse error). Preserved every id and covers list.
- spec-verification (v1-v9): converted each entry to kind: command with the test command in target: (replacing the command:/execute: stub form). Every requirement r1-r16 is covered by at least one verification entry.
- spec-meta: flipped status: draft -> active.
- Prose, intent, ids, surface, decisions links left intact. No realized_by added (phase2). No requirement ids altered or removed.

Merge gate (all green locally):
- mix spec.validate -> ZERO errors for mutagen.mutation_pipeline (baseline was 10). Subject shows status active in .spec/state.json (regenerated, committed).
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors -> clean.
- mix test -> 640 tests, 0 failures (19 excluded).

Touched only: .spec/specs/mutation_pipeline.spec.md + generated .spec/state.json. Committed as 3996715 on branch mutagen-835.2.2/migrate-mutation-pipeline.

title: migrate mutagen.mutation_pipeline to SpecLedEx schema (10 errors)
